haiku45.summary_excerpt: Incomplete deliverable. Critical violations: (1) Actions not pinned to full SHA—requires `uses: actions/checkout@<40-hex-SHA>  # v4.1.0, YYYY-MM-DD` per spec, not `@v4/@v5` (lines 8–9); (2) Workflow references non-existent `fixtures/` dir (line 18) and `tests/` dir (line 26)—will fail immediately; (3) Missing required artifacts: no `act-result.txt`, no actionlint validation proof, no `act push` execution results. Python code itself is well-written (clear parsing, proper error handling, good type

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation with clear separation of concerns. Python code is idiomatic and well-typed. The workflow effectively uses GHA features like Job Summaries and permissions. Aggregation and flaky detection logic is robust and easy to extend.
